creator: xaa+fbsdbug@dohd.org
text:
I've recreated the patch, updated message file, and removed the beforementioned issue that every commit results in a new tarball.
I now use the 'release' archive, which is currently 24.12.

I'll upload two files (an archive of the net-mgmt/observium dir and the patch from current to new net-mgmt/observium .

Living on the edge, I've added myself as a maintainer.

I've created a new FreeBSD VM here to check, and it gave me a working observium setup. There might always be more issues, and things left to do (like perhaps creating a cronfile that gets added to %%LOCALBASE%%/etc/cron.d from the package, but still considering how to do that in order not to break things before the preparation in pkg-message is completed.
